ogTitle: Tynong vs Tynong North: Climate Safety

heading: Tynong vs Tynong North — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tynong, Victoria and Tynong North, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tynong and Tynong North have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Tynong or Tynong North safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tynong has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Tynong North scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tynong scores 21/100 for bushfire risk. Tynong North scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tynong or Tynong North?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tynong has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
